title: NG22 9HB, Noble Foods Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/YP3432MK/V010
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Noble Foods Limited   Installation name: Longbelt Farm Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/YP3432MK/V010   "
